name: Cocoa Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together: flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the sugar, brown sugar, egg whites, cocoa, and cinnamon to the dry mixture. Stir until just combined.
3. Grease a 9" x 13" pan with cooking spray or line it with parchment paper.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Sprinkle the topping (sugar, cinnamon) evenly over the top of the batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool before serving. This cake freezes well.
